nl_query: Customer phone numbers for liquor buyers
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT store_no) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales

nl_query: What were total liquor sales dollars?
sql: SELECT SUM(sales_dollars) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales
SELECT county_name AS county_name, SUM(sales_dollars) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales GROUP BY county_name ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT county_name AS county_name, store_city AS store_city, SUM(sales_dollars) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales GROUP BY county_name, store_city ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT category_name AS category_name, im_desc AS item_desc, SUM(sales_dollars) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales GROUP BY category_name, im_desc ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT substr(ordered_on, 1, 7) AS ordered_month, SUM(sales_dollars) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales GROUP BY substr(ordered_on, 1, 7) ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT strftime('%Y', ordered_on) || '-Q' || ((cast(strftime('%m', ordered_on) as integer) + 2) / 3) AS ordered_quarter, county_name AS county_name, SUM(sales_dollars) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales GROUP BY strftime('%Y', ordered_on) || '-Q' || ((cast(strftime('%m', ordered_on) as integer) + 2) / 3), county_name ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT SUM(sales_bottles) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales
SELECT vendor_name AS vendor_name, SUM(sales_bottles) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales GROUP BY vendor_name ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT category_name AS category_name, im_desc AS item_desc, SUM(sales_bottles) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales GROUP BY category_name, im_desc ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT county_name AS county_name, SUM(sales_liters) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales GROUP BY county_name ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 20

nl_query: Volume in liters by county and city
sql: SELECT county_name AS county_name, store_city AS store_city, SUM(sales_liters) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales GROUP BY county_name, store_city ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT vendor_name AS vendor_name, COUNT(DISTINCT item_no) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales GROUP BY vendor_name ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT category_name AS category_name, SUM(sales_dollars) / NULLIF(SUM(sales_bottles), 0) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales GROUP BY category_name ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 20

nl_query: Price per bottle by category and item
sql: SELECT category_name AS category_name, im_desc AS item_desc, SUM(sales_dollars) / NULLIF(SUM(sales_bottles), 0) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales GROUP BY category_name, im_desc ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT county_name AS county_name, SUM(sales_dollars) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT invoice_id), 0) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales GROUP BY county_name ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT county_name AS county_name, store_city AS store_city, SUM(sales_dollars) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT invoice_id), 0) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales GROUP BY county_name, store_city ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT vendor_name AS vendor_name, SUM(sales_dollars) / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT invoice_id), 0) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales GROUP BY vendor_name ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 20

nl_query: What is the weather in Iowa tomorrow?
Customer phone numbers for liquor buyers
What were total liquor sales dollars?
sql: SELECT SUM(sales_dollars) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales
SELECT county_name AS county_name, SUM(sales_dollars) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales GROUP BY county_name ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT store_city AS store_city, SUM(sales_dollars) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales GROUP BY store_city ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT im_desc AS item_desc, SUM(sales_dollars) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales GROUP BY im_desc ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT substr(ordered_on, 1, 7) AS ordered_month, SUM(sales_dollars) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales GROUP BY substr(ordered_on, 1, 7) ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT county_name AS county_name, strftime('%Y', ordered_on) || '-Q' || ((cast(strftime('%m', ordered_on) as integer) + 2) / 3) AS ordered_quarter, SUM(sales_dollars) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales GROUP BY county_name, strftime('%Y', ordered_on) || '-Q' || ((cast(strftime('%m', ordered_on) as integer) + 2) / 3) ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT SUM(sales_bottles) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales
SELECT vendor_name AS vendor_name, SUM(sales_bottles) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales GROUP BY vendor_name ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT im_desc AS item_desc, SUM(sales_bottles) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales GROUP BY im_desc ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT county_name AS county_name, SUM(sales_liters) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales GROUP BY county_name ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 20

nl_query: Volume in liters by county and city
sql: SELECT store_city AS store_city, SUM(sales_liters) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales GROUP BY store_city ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 20

nl_query: How many invoices are in the public liquor data?
sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT invoice_id) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales
SELECT substr(ordered_on, 1, 7) AS ordered_month, COUNT(DISTINCT invoice_id) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales GROUP BY substr(ordered_on, 1, 7) ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 20

nl_query: Order count by county and city
sql: SELECT store_city AS store_city, COUNT(DISTINCT invoice_id) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales GROUP BY store_city ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT store_no) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales
SELECT county_name AS county_name, COUNT(DISTINCT store_no) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales GROUP BY county_name ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT store_city AS store_city, COUNT(DISTINCT store_no) AS metric_value FROM iowa_liquor_sales GROUP BY store_city ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT 20
